title: SunPump
mainTitle: Configured SunPump launch route, upstream currently unavailable
subtitle: Payment route exists, but the upstream POST endpoint returns 405.
description:
## Current status

This catalog entry tracks the SunPump launch route behind x402 payment. The gateway route is configured for TRON Mainnet/Nile and BNB Smart Chain payments, but the current SunPump upstream POST endpoint returns `405 Not Allowed`. Do not use it for successful token creation until SunPump publishes or restores an active launch API path.

## Intended use

The route is intended to submit token launch metadata after x402 payment settlement. Once the upstream API is active, callers should POST JSON metadata with `name`, `symbol`, `description`, optional social URLs, and optional image data.

## Code usage

Use the route only for payment-route integration testing while the upstream remains unavailable. A paid call may settle and then return the upstream `405 Not Allowed` response.
useCase: Use this provider only to inspect the configured x402 payment route while the SunPump upstream launch API is unavailable.

zh-CN.title: SunPump
zh-CN.subtitle: 支付路由已配置，但上游 POST 当前返回 405。
zh-CN.description:
## 当前状态

这个 catalog 条目用于记录接入 x402 支付的 SunPump 发币路由。Gateway 已配置 TRON Mainnet/Nile 和 BNB Smart Chain 支付路由，但当前 SunPump 上游 POST 接口返回 `405 Not Allowed`。在 SunPump 发布或恢复可用发币 API 之前，不要把它用于实际创建 token。

## 预期用途

该路由原本用于在 x402 支付结算后提交发币元数据。上游 API 恢复后，调用方应 POST 包含 `name`、`symbol`、`description`、可选社交链接和可选图片数据的 JSON 元数据。

## 调用说明

上游不可用期间，只建议用于检查支付路由配置。付费调用可能完成结算，然后返回上游 `405 Not Allowed` 响应。
zh-CN.useCase: 上游 SunPump 发币 API 不可用期间，仅用于检查已配置的 x402 支付路由。
zh-CN.mainTitle: 已配置的 SunPump 发币路由，上游当前不可用
